replaces_indices: 0-11 (overwrite live clips; import with --force, rebuild grid/posters, purge CDN)
0-11 (overwrite live clips; import with --force, rebuild grid/posters, purge CDN)
note: Single source of truth. `prompt` is what the clip is generated from AND what goes to REAL_TAG_META[id].prompt. REAL_VIDEOS[id] already exists (flat) and is unchanged; we overwrite the .mp4 in R2 and add the REAL_TAG_META entry. Do NOT change TAG_VISIBLE_LIMITS (stays 100).

clips.title: The Case File
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A dim police records archive, floor-to-ceiling shelves of boxed case files, a single desk lamp. Night, still, dust in the beam. A person in a rumpled shirt and loosened tie sits at a cluttered desk, one file open, reading intently. A cold coffee, a pinboard of photos and red string, a brass desk lamp. Warm pooled lamplight against deep blue shadow. 40mm, slow dolly in. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, gentle motion blur, 24fps.

clips.title: Service
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A steamy professional restaurant kitchen mid-service, stainless steel, hanging copper pans, a full ticket rail. Evening, heat haze rising. A person in a white chef's jacket and apron leans over a plate, tweezers placing a final garnish. A flaming pass, stacked white plates, a wiped-clean rim. Warm overhead work light catching the steam. 50mm, slow dolly in. Shallow depth of field, fine grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Departure
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. An airport departure lounge at night, floor-to-ceiling windows, a jet at the gate, runway lights beyond. Late night, quiet terminal. A person in a travel coat with a backpack stands at the glass, one hand on the pane, watching the plane. A rolling suitcase, a boarding pass, reflections of terminal lights. Cool interior fluorescents with warm runway glow outside. 35mm, slow dolly in. Shallow depth of field, soft grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Soundcheck
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. An empty concert hall, a single microphone in a hard spotlight, rows of dark seats beyond. Night, the hush before a show. A person in a fitted jacket stands at the mic, head bowed, hand lifting to it. A cable coiled on the floor, a lone stool, a water bottle. One hard white spotlight, deep black surround, volumetric haze. 50mm, slow dolly in. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Aisle
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, near-future. A cold data center aisle, towering server racks pulsing with blue and green LEDs, cabling overhead. Night, the hum of fans. A person in a technical jacket walks the aisle, tablet in hand, glancing up at the racks. Fiber bundles, a status screen, a keycard on a lanyard. Cool blue rack glow with hard edge light. 35mm, slow dolly in. Shallow depth of field, fine grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Easel
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A sunlit artist's loft studio, canvases stacked against exposed brick, a large work on the easel. Morning, dust drifting in warm light. A person in a paint-streaked smock stands before the easel, brush raised, studying the canvas. Jars of brushes, a smeared palette, drop cloths. Soft north-window daylight, warm and clean. 40mm, slow dolly in. Shallow depth of field, gentle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Top Floor
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A high-rise corner office at night, floor-to-ceiling glass, the city grid glittering below. Late night, silent. A person in a tailored suit stands at the window, hands in pockets, looking out over the city. A glass desk, a single lamp, a skyline of lights. Warm interior lamp against cool city glow. 35mm, slow dolly in. Shallow depth of field, soft grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Dawn Haul
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A weathered fishing dock at dawn, moored boats, coiled ropes, mist over flat water. Early morning, cold fog. A person in oilskins and a knit cap stands at the dock edge, coiling a line, looking to the horizon. Lobster traps, gulls, a lantern on a piling. Soft pink dawn through mist, cool and low. 35mm, slow dolly in. Shallow depth of field, fine grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Ghost Light
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. An empty theater stage, worn wooden boards, a ghost light on a stand, red velvet curtains half-drawn. Night, still. A person in simple rehearsal clothes stands center stage, arms beginning to lift, mid-breath. A single bare bulb, chalk marks, a pointe shoe. One warm bulb, long shadows across the boards. 50mm, slow dolly in. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Earthrise
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, near-future. The interior of a spacecraft cabin, instrument panels aglow, a round window onto Earth below. Orbit, silent. A person in a flight suit floats at the window, one hand on the frame, gazing at the planet. Switch panels, a floating pen, a mission patch. Cool cabin light with warm Earthglow through the port. 35mm, slow dolly in. Shallow depth of field, fine grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Last Round
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A worn boxing gym at night, a heavy bag, a ring in shadow, fight posters peeling off the wall. Late, empty. A person in a tank top with wrapped hands stands before the heavy bag, breathing hard, about to strike. A speed bag, a stool, a towel over the ropes. Hard single work-light overhead, deep shadow. 40mm, slow dolly in. Shallow depth of field, grain, sweat sheen, 24fps.

clips.title: The Stacks
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A grand old library reading room, towering shelves, brass railings, green-shaded lamps. Afternoon, hushed, dust in the shafts. A person in a cardigan holds an open book, looking up at the high stacks. Rolling ladders, stacked tomes, a globe on a stand. Warm lamplight with cool daylight from high windows. 40mm, slow dolly in. Shallow depth of field, gentle grain, 24fps.
